introSection: Dinosaur Canyon is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Deadwood in Williamston, North Carolina, USA.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: This coaster featured a simple oval track layout, with bunny hills. A dinosaur statue sits in the center.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single train with 5 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 20 riders.

fullText:
Dinosaur Canyon is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Deadwood in Williamston, North Carolina, USA.

This coaster featured a simple oval track layout, with bunny hills. A dinosaur statue sits in the center.

Single train with 5 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 20 riders.
